title: genista sylvestris subsp. dalmatica
intro: Genista sylvestris subsp. dalmatica, also known as Dalmatian broom or Golden broom, is a plant species in the Fabaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. It has been used to treat various health issues, such as digestive problems, anxiety, and insomnia, thanks to its flavonoids and phenolic compounds. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are commonly used in natural remedies to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
